text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year's summer training camp has gone by in a flash. I can't
believe today is our last day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono has taken every exercise I throw her in stride—and
with a huge smile on her face. Perhaps I can reward her with a
delicious meal!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Another great day of training! This camp sure has been fun.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So, what would you like for dinner?! I know the lodges have food for
us, but since this is our last day, I thought—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: The thing... Is it something for work? Do you need help?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You were so helpful throughout the whooole camp, so I really think
you should rest...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oooh! Ahaha, I see, I see.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm a little sad we can't eat together, but that's okay! I'll see you
laterrr! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Looks like my smooth-talking managed to convince her. I don't have
a lot of time, so I'm off to start prepping our meal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First things first, I need ingredients... I call out to a few students to
see if they have any recommendations for shops, but their reaction
isn't what I expected.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You're treating Bono to a meal? Then we wanna help too! You're not
the only one she cooks for, you know!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I know a good fishmonger! They were selling lots of delicious fish
earlier!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
There's a good vegetable stand around here too, so I'll go there. As
for the meat... can you handle it?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume D
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I bet if we asked around, we could get more people involved.
I'll go talk to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, the number of cooks in the kitchen has increased
drastically. We divvy up the work and get to it. Two hours later...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow, wow, WOOOOOW!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Where did this feast come from?! Skewers, yakisoba, and pan-fried
fish too! ...Ah, there's even chanko!
choice_data_list: We made this all for you.
We made this all for you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? For... me?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Well, it was originally your trainer's idea, but we wanted to thank you
too, so we joined in.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for always cooking such good food! Seriously, this
has been a long time coming.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Eating your cooking always fills me with energy. It's like I'm recharged
and ready to take on the next day of training.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume D
text_block_list.text:
You always work so hard to make us happy, but we want to make you
happy too...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Aww, you guys...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, consider your plan a success! I'm so happy—and hungry! Can I
dig in?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, of course!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: But before that... Ready? Go!

text_block_list.name: All
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the food!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The night air mingles with the scent of our feast and our laughter. But
one student's smile is the biggest of all...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: BUONO! This dish, that dish! They're all super-duper buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone! Thank you, Trainer! Eating tasty food made for
you really does fill you with joy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And that's Hishi Akebono's.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the party, we clean up and students gradually make their way
back to the lodge.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... ☆ I'm sooo full! Thank you again for today!
choice_data_list: Did we do enough to thank you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Of course you did! I couldn't be happier!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And you know what? I think I get it now... I know what that sumo
wrestler meant about the feelings of the people eating!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We said "thanks for the food" before eating, right? I think that little
phrase is the finishing touch on every dish.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
"Thank you" and "I'm so happy." A meal wouldn't be complete without
those words sprinkled in beforehand.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Just like ingredients, you need lots and lots of feelings to make a
chanko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Up till now, I've been focusing solely on making other people happy
with my cooking...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And while I certainly noticed everyone's gratitude towards me, I don't
think I gave it the credit it deserves.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
From now on, when people thank me, I'll listen. I have to realize those
words are a sign that I'm offering them a truly satisfying meal.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: If I do that, maybe they'll even give me a thank-you at the end of the meal too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I've always wanted to be a pot of chanko and bring smiles to
everyone's faces... But...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Now, I hope my food makes the people eating want to spread that smile to someone else. Only then can I be a true chanko.
choice_data_list: I think you're already doing that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Am I? ...I see. So that's how you see me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Sounds like you're the dashi stock to my hot pot!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: The dashi stock! The very foundation of any hot pot!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: In other words, I can't be a pot of chanko without you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono certainly has a unique way of expressing it, but I can
tell from her smile that she trusts me with all her heart.
